lane.title: 10 Packaging Design
lane.last_task: Create NCH flask 250ml and 500ml consistent production master board
lane.last_summary: Created existing-file Figma production master page 'Codex Production Master 250ml 500ml Consistent' in cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey. The board contains 250ml approved locked front, 250ml editable back v6, 250ml spines/gables, and 500ml front/back/spines/gables adapted from the same approved 250ml visual grammar: kraft/chamoisee base, cream-gold side filigree, serif hierarchy, dual QR back system, dark legal footer. Older plain 500ml front is retained only as a faded source/dieline reference because it did not match the approved 250ml front strongly enough.
lane.next_action: Review page 226:2 in Figma, approve or adjust visual placements, then run final vendor export pass: hide nonprint guides, export SVG/PDF per panel, qpdf/pdfinfo dimension checks, QR decode/live route checks, phone/legal/FSSAI proof, and dieline/bleed verification before vendor handoff.
lane.mutation_status: Existing Figma file mutation only; no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final files or live site routes changed.
lane.proof: Figma screenshot downloaded to /private/tmp/nch_production_master_250_500_consistent_final.png; Figma readback confirmed nodes 226:15 250ml front 385.5118x612.2834, 226:18 250ml back 385.5118x612.2834 with NET QTY 250 mL, 226:131 500ml front 385.5118x697.3228, 226:134 500ml back 385.5118x697.3228 with NET QTY 500 mL.
lane.artifacts: Figma page 226:2 'Codex Production Master 250ml 500ml Consistent'; screenshot /private/tmp/nch_production_master_250_500_consistent_final.png.
lane.data_freshness: 2026-05-28 Figma MCP mutation and screenshot/readback verification.
lane.rollback: Delete or ignore Figma page 226:2; original pages 1:7, 1:8, and 197:2 were not destroyed.

recent_events.task: Initialize lane and verify NCH flask review state
recent_events.summary: Re-read packaging-design lane memory, packaging prompt, Claude execution digest, marketing graph state, creative asset library registry, and decisions log. Confirmed repo checkout is on claude/captain-pos-guard with unrelated dirty tracked work, so no repo edit/stage is safe from this lane. Figma file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey is readable/writable through use_figma and contains page 197:2 'Codex Final 250ml Front Back Editable' with locked front, locked back v5, editable back v6, and Gemini concept frames. Downloaded/visually inspected review screenshot at /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png. Source front and back v5 PDFs qpdf-clean and both page size 385.512 x 612.283 pt (136x216mm). QR PNGs decode: WhatsApp dynamic to https://nawabichaihouse.com/go/flask and Google review to https://g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review. Live check shows /go/flask currently returns the NCH homepage, not a dedicated flask/claim WhatsApp redirect, and homepage links point to wa.me/918008002045 while print art says +91 74832 70215.
recent_events.next_action: Before vendor-final output, either fix/verify the /go/flask route to the intended flask claim WhatsApp destination and confirm phone/legal/FSSAI text, or have Nihaf explicitly approve keeping the homepage route. After approval, adjust editable back v6 placements if needed, then run final deterministic SVG/PDF/QR/bleed/dieline vendor checks.
recent_events.mutation_status: Read-only verification and memory writeback only; no Figma mutation, no repo mutation, no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/vendor final file mutation, no bulk dielines.
recent_events.proof: Figma page 197:2 verified via use_figma; screenshot /private/tmp/nch_figma_review_page_20260528.png; qpdf/pdfinfo passed for front and back v5 print PDFs; zbarimg decoded both QR PNGs; curl -I -L confirmed Google review resolves to write-review page and /go/flask returns 200 homepage.
recent_events.live_ids: Figma file cNkjzNFs4Xb1bdJUBB0Xey; review page 197:2; locked front frame 197:5; locked back v5 frame 197:6; editable back v6 frame 197:7; Gemini reference frame 197:8; NCH /go/flask URL; Google review URL g.page/r/CQozT6UxiKIGEBM/review

recent_events.task: Build NCH flask front/back editable Figma review board

Locked approved front reference and v5 back reference are nested into their frames. Editable back v6 frame now contains matched embroidered background, larger emblem, dual QR cards, Instagram/website/phone/statutory text, divider, and dark footer band. recent_events.task: Refine NCH 250ml flask back aesthetic with Gemini-guided dual QR system
recent_events.summary: Built v5 Gemini-refined NCH 250ml flask back production candidate at /Users/nihaf/Downloads/NCH_Flask_Back_Production_2026-05-25_v5_GeminiRefined: larger NCH emblem, simplified premium hierarchy, WhatsApp dynamic QR plus Google review QR, Instagram identity line, dark sepia legal footer, front-matched kraft/border system, and Gemini nano-banana-pro-preview concept reference. Verified qpdf, PDF page size 136x216mm, and zbar decoding of both QRs.
